title: Media, Connectors, Transceivers, and Architectures · Packet Lens: Net Ethernet Media
summary: Select and document a campus and data-center physical design under distance, bandwidth, environment, and redundancy constraints. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net ethernet media increment in a physical media and topology bill of design. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Compare 802.3 copper categories, shielding, distance, speed, duplex, PoE, coaxial, DAC, and twinax use cases.
Distinguish unicast, broadcast, multicast, and anycast delivery scope and network behavior.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook
# Commands run only in the deterministic browser simulator.
# Add one observation, command, expected signal, and conclusion per activity.
